name: Day of the Dead
rules_text: H:3 A:0 HP:10 L:1 Nomadic. Cast on globe. After all combat, for every recruit group that died in combat this turn not in a structure, a neutral group of an equal number of Skeletons is created in the recruit group's square, and Day of the Dead is dispelled. Skeletons receive -2 damage from missiles (before checking armor).
